gb: Please enter your PayPlug account password
it: Si prega di inserire la password del tuo conto PayPlug

default: In LIVE mode, the payments will generate real transactions.
fr: En mode LIVE, vous acceptez des paiements réels.
en: In LIVE mode, the payments will generate real transactions.
gb: In LIVE mode, the payments will generate real transactions.
it: In modalità LIVE, i pagamenti generano transazioni reali.

fr: Si vous souhaitez plus d'informations,  contactez-nous à l'adresse [1]support@payplug.com[/1]
en: For more information, please contact us at [1]support@payplug.com[/1]
gb: For more information, please contact us at [1]support@payplug.com[/1]
it: Per ricevere ulteriori informazioni, contattaci al seguente indirizzo e-mail: [1]supporto@payplug.com[/1]

fr: Vous pouvez désormais utiliser le mode LIVE  et encaisser des paiements dès maintenant.
en: You can now use the LIVE mode and collect payments.
gb: You can now use the LIVE mode and collect payments.
it: Puoi utilizzare fin d'ora la modalità LIVE e iniziare a incassare i pagamenti.

default: In TEST mode, all payments will be simulations and will not generate real transactions.
fr: En mode TEST, tous les paiements sont des simulations et ne génèreront pas de transactions réelles.
en: In TEST mode, all payments will be simulations and will not generate real transactions.
gb: In TEST mode, all payments will be simulations and will not generate real transactions.
it: Pagamenti in modalità TEST, sono simulazioni e non generano transazioni reali.

en: Congratulations, your application has been accepted!
gb: Congratulations, your application has been accepted!
it: Congratulazioni, il tuo dossier è stato accettato!

fr: Votre dossier est en cours de traitement.
it: Il tuo dossier è in fase di elaborazione.

fr: Votre configuration a bien été enregistrée.
it: La tua configurazione è stata salvata

default: Please activate your account to perform LIVE transactions.
fr: Vous devez activez votre compte pour accepter des paiements en mode LIVE.
en: Please activate your account to perform LIVE transactions.
gb: Please activate your account to perform LIVE transactions.
it: Attiva il tuo conto per effettuare transazioni LIVE.

default: You are able to perform only TEST transactions.
fr: Vous pouvez effectuer des transactions en mode TEST.
en: You are able to perform only TEST transactions.
gb: You are able to perform only TEST transactions.
it: Puoi effettuare transazioni solo in fase TEST.

default: Before being able to display PayPlug to your customers you need to connect your PayPlug account below.
fr: Connectez-vous ci-dessous à votre compte PayPlug pour pouvoir afficher le module à vos clients.
en: Before being able to display PayPlug to your customers you need to connect your PayPlug account below.
gb: Before being able to display PayPlug to your customers you need to connect your PayPlug account below.
it: Connettiti qui di seguito al tuo conto PayPlug per poter rendere visibile il modulo ai tuoi clienti.

fr: Afficher le module PayPlug à mes clients
Présentation de la page de paiement
Vos clients verront apparaître le formulaire de paiement directement dans la page de checkout de votre boutique.
en: Your customers will see the payment form appear directly on the checkout page of your store.
gb: Your customers will see the payment form appear directly on the checkout page of your store.
it: I tuoi clienti vedranno comparire il modulo di pagamento direttamente nella pagina di checkout del tuo negozio.

fr: Activer le paiement en un clic
it: Attiva il pagamento in un click

fr: Vos clients pourront enregistrer leur carte et effectuer leurs prochains achats en un clic.
en: Your customers will be able to register their card and make their next purchase in one click.
gb: Your customers will be able to register their card and make their next purchase in one click.
it: I tuoi clienti potranno salvare la loro carta ed effettuare il loro prossimo acquisto in un click.

fr: Attention : ce type de paiement n'est pas garanti.[1]Si un défaut de paiement survient sur une des futures échéances alors ce montant sera perdu.
en: Please note: this type of payment is not guaranteed.[1] If a default affects one of the future instalments, this amount will be lost.
gb: Please note: this type of payment is not guaranteed.[1] If a default affects one of the future instalments, this amount will be lost.
it: Attenzione: questo tipo di pagamento non è garantito.[1] In caso di mancato pagamento di una delle prossime rate, l'importo sarà perso.

fr: Activer les paiements fractionnés non garantis
it: Attiva i pagamenti rateali non garantiti

fr: Vous pourrez consulter toutes vos échéances de paiement (passées et à venir) dans ce
en: You can view all your payment deadlines (past and future) in this
gb: You can view all your payment deadlines (past and future) in this
it: È possibile visualizzare tutte le scadenze di pagamento (passate e future) in questo

fr: Vous disposez d'un délai de 7 jours maximum pour capturer le paiement (à compter de la date d'autorisation).
en: You have a maximum of 7 days to capture the payment (from the date of authorisation).
gb: You have a maximum of 7 days to capture the payment (from the date of authorisation).
it: Hai 7 giorni al massimo per catturare il pagamento (a partire dalla data di autorizzazione).

fr: Comment souhaitez vous déclencher la capture du paiement :
en: How do you want to trigger the payment capture?
gb: How do you want to trigger the payment capture?
it: Come vuoi attivare la cattura del pagamento :

fr: Proposez à vos clients de régler leurs commandes en
en: Offer your customers the option to pay for their orders in
gb: Offer your customers the option to pay for their orders in
it: Proponi ai tuoi clienti di pagare il loro ordine in

fr: Votre serveur doit disposer d'une version 1.0.1 ou supérieure d'OpenSSL.
it: Il tuo server deve essere OpenSSL 1.0.1 o successivo

fr: Contrôlez votre environnement pour assurer le fonctionnement optimal du module.
en: Control your environment to ensure that the module is in perfect working order
gb: Control your environment to ensure that the module is in perfect working order
it: Controlla il tuo ambiente per garantire il buon funzionamento del modulo.

fr: L'extension PHP cURL est installée et activée.
en: PHP cURL extension must be enabled on your server
gb: PHP cURL extension must be enabled on your server
it: L'estensione PHP cURL deve essere abilitata sul tuo server

fr: La version PHP de votre serveur doit être la version 5.6 au minimum.
en: Your server must run PHP 5.6 or greater
gb: Your server must run PHP 5.6 or greater
it: Il tuo server deve essere su PHP 5.6 o maggiore

fr: La configuration requise pour utiliser le module PayPlug n'est pas satisfaite. Une fois les problèmes corrigés, actualisez la page ou cliquez sur vérifier.
en: Unfortunately at least one issue is preventing you from using PayPlug. Refresh the page or click 'Check' once they are fixed
gb: Unfortunately at least one issue is preventing you from using PayPlug. Refresh the page or click 'Check' once they are fixed
it: Potresti incontrare una difficoltà usando PayPlug. Aggiorna la pagina o clicca "Verifica" una volta corretti

fr: La simulation de votre échéancier est temporairement indisponible. Vous retrouverez cette information à l'étape du paiement.
en: Your payment schedule simulation is temporarily unavailable. You will find this information at the payment stage.
gb: Your payment schedule simulation is temporarily unavailable. You will find this information at the payment stage.
it: La simulazione del tuo piano di finanziamento non è per il momento disponibile. Queste informazioni ti saranno fornite al momento del pagamento.

default: An error occurred. Please retry in few seconds.
fr: Une erreur s'est produite. Veuillez réessayer dans quelques secondes.
en: An error occurred. Please retry in few seconds.
gb: An error occurred. Please retry in few seconds.
it: Si è verificato un errore. Riprova tra un attimo.
Le tue informazioni sono state salvate

default: At least one of the fields is not correctly completed.
fr: Au moins un champ n'est pas completé correctement.
en: At least one of the fields is not correctly completed.
gb: At least one of the fields is not correctly completed.
it: Almeno un campo non è stato completato correttamente.

fr: Veuillez sélectionner une option parmi celles proposées
en: Please select one of the following options
gb: Please select one of the following options

fr: L'option que vous choisirez ci-dessus permettra au module de paiement PayPlug d'intérpreter avec précision votre statut de commande de façon automatisée. [1]En savoir plus[/1]
en: By selecting one of the above options, you will enable the PayPlug payment module to accurately interpret your order status in an automated manner. [1]Learn more[/1]
gb: By selecting one of the above options, you will enable the PayPlug payment module to accurately interpret your order status in an automated manner. [1]Learn more[/1]
it: Grazie all'opzione che hai appena scelto, il modulo di pagamento PayPlug sarà in grado di identificare con precisione e in modo automatico lo stato del tuo ordine. [1]Per saperne di più[/1]
